value.rationale: The page is about Codex permission profiles (filesystem and network access configuration). While it briefly mentions ".devcontainer" as an example path in a config snippet (kept read-only under workspace roots), this is not describing a "Dev-container integration" feature that runs the agent inside a defined dev container or isolated runtime. The page does not describe, announce, or document any feature for running the Codex agent inside a dev container as an isolated runtime environment. The claim is not substantiated by the page content.
